title: Help [Action]
excerpt: The Help action lets a creature spend its action to improve another creature's attempt or to assist with another immediate task in the current scene.
markdown:
# Help [Action]

The Help action commits a creature's [[action]] to assisting another creature instead of acting directly on its own behalf.

## Rules

- Help improves another creature's immediate chance to succeed at a task, attack, or other resolution that can benefit from timely assistance
- Help works by adding support, positioning, warning, distraction, or another cooperative contribution that matters to the current situation
- the assistance must remain relevant when the aided creature resolves the supported action or check

## Common Uses

- aiding an [[ally]] during a combat exchange
- helping another creature notice, interpret, or manipulate something in the environment
- contributing to a coordinated effort where timing or shared effort matters

## Limits

Help does not replace the aided creature's own resolution. It changes the conditions around that resolution by making support available at the right time.
